---
title: "OERs for Users"
format: html

previous:
  href: "../index.qmd"
  text: "Home"

next:
  href: "User-Discovering OERs.qmd"
  text: "Discovering OERs"
---

### Learning outcomes

Learners will be able to:

-   Locate OERs using reputable repositories and tools.

-   Correctly interpret open licences.

[![](images/clipboard-2765196364.png){fig-alt="Go to next page: User-Discovering%20OERs.html" fig-align="center" width="50"}](/OERs%20for%20users/User-Discovering%20OERs.html)

------------------------------------------------------------------------

::: nav-footer
```{=html}
<a href="{{< meta previous.href >}}" aria-label="Go to previous page: {{< meta previous.text >}}">
  <span aria-hidden="true">«</span> {{< meta previous.text >}}
</a>

<a href="{{< meta next.href >}}" aria-label="Go to next page: {{< meta next.text >}}">
  {{< meta next.text >}} <span aria-hidden="true">»</span>
</a>
```
:::
